description:
A new way to collaborate

Empowering teams by messenger, meetings, calendar, docs, and emails. It's all in one place.
Base
- Base supports the DeepSeek R1 model as a field shortcut, combining robust reasoning and chain-of-thought capabilities of DeepSeek with Base's advanced data management and automation features. The field shortcut also supports the online version of DeepSeek R1, enabling retrieval and analysis of the latest internet data to generate content.
- You can set editor, viewer, and administrator roles in advanced permissions for more effective division and assignment of tasks.
- You can also set Only Custom Roles Can Access in advanced permissions to only allow specified custom roles to access the base. Other users with the base link or added through the sharing panel will have no access.
